PASS .tmp/processRefund.test.ts
  AC1 – credit card refunds carry no fee
    ✓ returns fee=0 for credit_card payment method
    ✓ returns refundAmount equal to the full amount for credit_card
  AC2 – bank transfer refunds deduct a 1.50 fee
    ✓ returns fee=1.5 for bank_transfer payment method
    ✓ returns refundAmount = amount - 1.5 for bank_transfer
  AC3 – empty orderId throws a validation error
    ✓ throws "orderId is required" when orderId is an empty string (3 ms)
    ✓ throws an Error instance for empty orderId
  AC4 – amount of 0 throws a validation error
    ✓ throws "amount must be positive" when amount is exactly 0
    ✓ also throws for negative amounts (amount <= 0 guard) (1 ms)
  AC5 – amount of 10001 exceeds the maximum and throws
    ✓ throws "amount exceeds maximum refund limit" for amount=10001
    ✓ also throws for amounts well above the limit (e.g. 99999)
  AC6 – amount of 10000 is the upper boundary and must succeed
    ✓ does not throw for amount=10000
    ✓ returns status=approved and full refundAmount for 10000 with credit_card
    ✓ boundary also works for bank_transfer with the 1.50 fee deducted
  AC7 – whitespace-only orderId (e.g. "   ") throws a validation error

    ✓ throws for orderId=" " (single space)
